requirements.label: All required CI jobs green
requirements.description: The release commit must have successful results for every required CI job.

requirements.label: Python coverage gate
requirements.description: The current 3.2.x CI floor remains 85%; this is distinct from the 4.0 RC measured target.

requirements.label: Python measured coverage
requirements.description: The full Python suite must meet the explicit 4.0 RC coverage target.

requirements.label: Rust workspace fmt, clippy, and tests
requirements.description: Rust formatting, linting with warnings denied, and workspace tests are release gates.

requirements.label: Rust Docker sidecar smoke
requirements.description: The non-root Rust sidecar image must build and pass its offline endpoint smoke.

requirements.label: Hybrid runtime E2E and fallback
requirements.description: Python-to-Rust delegation and Python fallback must pass over the real container network.

requirements.label: RAG parity corpus
requirements.description: All deterministic normalization, ranking, citation, and validation cases must remain present.

requirements.label: Policy deny and audit contract
requirements.description: Stable deny codes, redacted audit events, and fail-mode execution blocking must stay covered.

requirements.label: Release preflight
requirements.description: Versioned release evidence, doctor checks, and the dry-run package path must stay green.

requirements.label: Default Python deployment unchanged
requirements.description: All Rust delegates remain off and the default Compose file remains Python-only during readiness review.

requirements.label: Python rollback path documented and verified
requirements.description: The stateless rollback to all-Python execution must remain explicit and exercised by hybrid fallback tests.

requirements.label: Rust default-on component decision
requirements.description: The exact Gateway, MCP, Policy, and RAG default-on set has not been approved.

requirements.label: Rust sidecar default deployment decision
requirements.description: The sidecar is optional; inclusion in the default 4.0 deployment has not been approved.

requirements.label: Python fallback lifecycle decision
requirements.description: The support period and removal criteria for Python fallbacks have not been approved.

requirements.label: Gateway streaming Rust path
requirements.description: Streaming chat still uses Python and needs implementation or an explicit approved 4.0 design decision.

requirements.label: MCP real tool execution bridge
requirements.description: Rust handles JSON-RPC but does not yet bridge real Python tool execution.

requirements.label: Expand parity corpora
requirements.description: Add broader Policy and RAG corpora beyond the current deterministic baseline.

requirements.label: Hybrid performance benchmark
requirements.description: Record latency and throughput baselines for Python, Rust, and fallback paths.

requirements.label: Rust coverage metrics
requirements.description: Add Rust coverage reporting and establish a measured baseline.

requirements.label: Sidecar image size optimization
requirements.description: Measure and reduce the sidecar image without weakening health checks or non-root execution.

requirements.label: Persistent policy audit storage
requirements.description: Evaluate durable audit storage after the structured logging contract is stable.
